title: 写实摄影风格图
description: Express [{argument name="subject" default="a powerful AI builder"}] in a graffiti sketch style, presenting an overall visual effect of rapid sketching, free transformation, improvised hand-drawing, and draft-like qualiti
prompt_raw: Express [a powerful AI builder] in a graffiti sketch style, presenting an overall visual effect of rapid sketching, free transformation, improvised hand-drawing, and draft-like qualities. Lines are casual, exaggerated, varied in thickness, slightly messy but rhythmic and expressive, emphasizing generalization, exaggeration, fun, and spontaneity rather than rigorous realism or fine detail. Colors use rough, dry-brush block expressions, retaining uneven smears, brush marks, flying whites, and overlapping feelings. Colors automatically adapt to the [theme/subject], but the overall expression remains graffiti-like, sketch-like, and generalized. No transparent watercolor smudging, no delicate watercolor transitions, no paper textures, no soft atomization, and no dreamlike quality. The background is mainly white space, remaining simple, relaxed, unfinished, and design-oriented. A small amount of auxiliary symbols, arrows, marks, circles, repeated lines, handwritten text, or other graffiti elements can be added to enhance the sketchbook or essay-like visual language, but should not be too crowded or destroy the subject and atmosphere of the white space. The image content does not need to be written in advance; the [a powerful AI builder] will automatically deduce and generate the most suitable main image, actions, related elements, symbols, or simplified scenes. The whole maintains a unified graffiti sketch style and exaggerated generalized expression, avoiding complex realistic backgrounds and over-elaboration. Naturally add a unique signature "BlanPlan" as part of the image, placed discreetly but clearly in the lower-left, lower-right, or near the title. The style should be unified with the overall layout, like an artist's signature or design inscription; the signature font should be refined, restrained, and high-end, not too large, not destructive to the main composition, and not appearing abrupt or cheap.
prompt_preview: Express [{argument name="subject" default="a powerful AI builder"}] in a graffiti sketch style, presenting an overall visual effect of rapid sketching, free transformation, improvised hand-drawing, and draft-like qualiti
prompt_display_cn: 这是一种把抽象主题或人物概念转成涂鸦速写风视觉的提示词。重点是即兴手绘、粗糙笔触、飞白、厚薄变化和有节奏的乱线，而不是严谨写实。适合人物态度海报、街头风插画、品牌概念图和音乐封面。
prompt_template_cn: 用涂鸦速写风表现【主题/人物】。整体视觉像快速手绘草稿，自由变形、即兴、夸张、有趣，不追求严谨写实或精细细节。线条随性，粗细变化明显，略微凌乱但有节奏和表现力。色彩使用【色彩方式】，保留干刷、飞白、涂抹不均和叠色痕迹。画面可加入【符号元素】来强化主题。整体要有街头感、手作感、草图感和强烈个性，适合海报或封面。
variables_json: [{"key":"主题/人物","label":"主题/人物","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"色彩方式","label":"色彩方式","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"符号元素","label":"符号元素","type":"text","required":true}]
